topic: There is a door in my basement that wasn't there last week
title: There Is a Door in My Basement That Wasn't There Last Week | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: I have lived in this house for eleven years. I know every wall.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior shot of a residential basement, bare concrete walls, exposed overhead pipes, single bare bulb hanging from the ceiling casting a pool of light, storage shelves along one wall, deep shadows in the far corners, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last Monday I went downstairs to check the water heater.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a residential water heater in a basement corner, pipes running up to the ceiling, the pilot light indicator glowing faintly, concrete floor, low ambient light from a distant bare bulb, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It was there. Plain wood. Panel door.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a plain hollow-core interior door set into a concrete basement wall, the door slightly lighter in color than the surrounding wall, a simple brass knob, no trim around the frame, bare concrete floor in front of it, single overhead bulb light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The wall behind my workbench had always been solid.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a wooden workbench against a concrete basement wall, tools hanging on a pegboard, the workbench slightly pulled away from the wall revealing a gap, dim overhead light, sawdust on the floor, vertical 9:16 framing

close shot of a hand holding a point-and-shoot film camera at waist height in a dim basement, the camera aimed toward a plain door set in a concrete wall, ambient bare bulb light, slight grain, vertical 9:16 framing

extreme close up of a plain brass door knob on a hollow-core door, the metal surface showing fingerprints and slight wear, dim basement light catching the curve of the knob, deep shadow behind the door, vertical 9:16 framing

wide shot looking toward a plain door in a basement wall, the door closed, a single bare bulb overhead, the rest of the basement in shadow, a figure standing with their back to camera several feet from the door, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: That night. Footsteps below my bedroom.
scenes.image_prompt: low angle shot of a residential basement ceiling, exposed floor joists visible, a single bare bulb hanging, shadows between the joists deep and uneven, the concrete walls receding into darkness, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I called a contractor the next morning. Asked about the wall.
scenes.image_prompt: interior shot of a basement in morning light from a small ground-level window, a man in work clothes standing with his back to the camera looking at a concrete wall, clipboard in hand, tool bag on the floor beside him, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He went quiet for a long time and then said the concrete on that wall was poured last year, not in nineteen eighty two like the rest.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand pressing against a concrete basement wall, the texture of the concrete different on either side of an invisible vertical line, one section slightly smoother and lighter in color, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He left without finishing the quote.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an empty residential basement, a clipboard and pen lying on the concrete floor near the base of the wall, the plain door visible in the background, no people in frame, bare bulb light overhead, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The door is still there. I sleep upstairs now.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior shot of a two-story house at night, all ground floor lights dark, one upstairs bedroom window lit from inside, the rest of the house in shadow, a single car in the driveway, vertical 9:16 framing
